term: we have to get it out
englishDefinitions: we need to say it, reveal it, or remove it
used to express that something must be brought out into the open
persianTranslation: باید آن را بیرون بیاوریم/فاش کنیم
examples: We have to get it out before the meeting starts.
If it's bothering you, we have to get it out and talk about it.
We have to get it out so everyone knows the truth.
